research_topics.title: Temporal dynamics of population codes in prefrontal cortex during working memory
research_topics.notes: Focus on spiking neural network models and comparison with LFP data from OpenNeuro

research_topics.title: Neural manifold geometry in hippocampal place cells across sleep-wake cycles
research_topics.notes: Use dimensionality reduction techniques, compare wake vs REM vs NREM manifolds

research_topics.title: Predictive coding in visual cortex: a comparison of hierarchical Bayesian and SNN approaches
research_topics.notes: Leverage Allen Brain Observatory datasets, focus on V1 responses to natural images

reference_papers: Cunningham & Yu (2014) - Dimensionality reduction for large-scale neural recordings
Vyas et al. (2020) - Computation Through Neural Population Dynamics
Saxena & Cunningham (2019) - Towards the neural population doctrine
Shenoy et al. (2013) - Cortical Control of Arm Movements
Pandarinath et al. (2018) - Inferring single-trial neural population dynamics using sequential auto-encoders
